nasb.text: From there we put out to sea and sailed under the shelter of Cyprus because the winds were contrary.

esv.text: And putting out to sea from there we sailed under the lee of Cyprus, because the winds were against us.

cnv.text: 我們又從那裡開船，因為逆風，就沿著塞浦路斯背風而行。

ccb.text: 我们从那里启航后，由于遇到逆风，便沿着塞浦路斯的背风岸前行，

csbs.text: 我们从那里起航，因为逆风，就沿着塞浦路斯岛的背风岸航行。
